body:
You're going to want this on your Christmas tree. |

Friend, I've got just the gift for you and every President-Elect Trump fan on your Christmas list...

We've created a collectible Make America Great Again Christmas ornament in the shape of the classic red MAGA hat, finished with 14k gold.
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba1YwBAE1TeCFdWgaBEWdDRMN6aaaaCJMfBMDLNHra?m=-@vDxDt&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=o&p=&z=t9u~tC21j2ex2wjvSuWvlGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)

[**Order your collectible MAGA ornament today for $149 and get it in time for Christmas.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba1YwBAE1TeCFdWgaBEWdDRMN6aaaaCJMfBMDLNHra?m=-@vDxDt&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=p&p=&z=t9u~tC21j2ex2wjvSuWvlGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)

President-elect Trump loves Christmas and makes a point of proudly saying "Merry Christmas" every chance he gets.

This collectible ornament commemorates Trump's commitment to the Christmas spirit and will be a great addition to your family's tree this year.

[**Order one for your tree today.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba1YwBAE1TeCFdWgaBEWdDRMN6aaaaCJMfBMDLNHra?m=-@vDxDt&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=q&p=&z=t9u~tC21j2ex2wjvSuWvlGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)

Thank you,

[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba1YwBAE1TeCFdWgaBEWdDRMN6aaaaCJMfBMDLNHra?m=-@vDxDt&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=o&p=&z=t9u~tC21j2ex2wjvSuWvlGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)

Alex
Trump Store Manager

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Tom, Meg, Ben, and I have a lot to be thankful for this Thanksgiving. We're fortunate to have our family, our friends, our state, our country, and much more.
Of course, I would be remiss not to say how thankful I am to have had your support in our campaign for U.S. Senate. I truly mean it when I say that we would not have won without you.
We will undoubtedly face challenges in the months and years ahead, but I know that we will work together to continue to bring people in from the margins and ensure that everyone is fully included in our society.
Now, it's more important than ever that we do what we can to strengthen our communities and lift one another up. One way to do that is by supporting the New Hampshire Food Bank.
If you have a little extra to spare, please donate what you can so that others can enjoy a warm meal this Thanksgiving: [**https://donate.nhfoodbank.org/**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddd9/2a380d31/1459ec22/ff3043/1427157601/VEsH/ "https://donate.nhfoodbank.org/")
Wishing you and yours a very happy Thanksgiving.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddd9/2a380d31/1459ec22/ff304c/1427157601/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Deborah Ross
subject: happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

On this Thanksgiving, I want you to know how tremendously grateful I am for your support and faith in me. I also want you to know how important family, friends and faith in our country are to me during this time of profound transition. There is a lot to do, and I have as much energy today as I did a year ago and so many more friends.

In order to move forward, we must appreciate all that we have and challenge ourselves to do more. I spent the past year traveling throughout North Carolina and meeting extraordinary people who work hard every day to make a better life for themselves and their families. I met young entrepreneurs, retirees who volunteer in their communities, parents of disabled children and so many others who inspire me every day.

Now that the election is behind us, we need to focus on the work ahead for our country and our state. We have folks in eastern North Carolina still suffering from Hurricane Matthew. We have folks in western North Carolina battling forest fires. We have graduates working to pay back student loans, parents working minimum wage jobs to feed their kids, and seniors struggling to afford medicine and monthly bills. They need our help. Our people are resilient, but will only thrive if we all come together.

Please join me in spreading gratitude this Thanksgiving, recommitting to the fundamental principles of our great nation and reaching out to our brothers and sisters no matter our differences. We have more that unites us than divides us.

I wish you a very happy Thanksgiving.

All my best,
Deborah |
Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
P.O. Box 28258
Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42056/2cc31c44/46b583c/19f9f87f/3061733956/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.deborahross.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: our rights and freedoms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend,

Yesterday, I gathered with hundreds of volunteers in Baltimore to prepare Thanksgiving meals for needy families in Maryland. The room was filled with the wonderful aroma of tasty fixings, but also the spirit of giving and being good neighbors.

As communities across Maryland and our country celebrate Thanksgiving we have much to be thankful for. The rights and freedoms embraced up by our founders have enabled this country to weather difficult times and keep moving forward on the long road to a more perfect union. The principle of equal treatment under the law is one we continue working to realize for every American.

Nevertheless, recent calls for the rights of some Americans to be curtailed remind us that we cannot afford to take anything for granted. The refusal of the incoming White House Chief of Staff to rule out the possibility of creating a national registry of Muslim Americans is outrageous. The incoming administration needs to be reminded that many of the earliest settlers came to America fleeing religious persecution.

Let me be clear -- actions against any one group would be an assault against the values of each of us and setting up such a database to register individuals simply because of their faith would be un-American.

That's why I ask you to join with me this Thanksgiving to reaffirm our readiness to stand together against this kind of heavy handed action. It would be a departure from our basic values and would undermine the security of our country at a time when unity, more than anything, is needed to overcome the threats that we face.

If we stand together for what's right, we can defend the core principles that have guided this nation for so long and set us apart from brutal regimes around the world.

Thank you for your continued engagement -- your involvement is more important than ever.

Best wishes,

Chris
P.S. **[Click here to share your thoughts.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b41/70cdc2ba/473db2ab/39782f7/1079050767/VEsH/ "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=.%40vanhollenformd%E2%80%8B%20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+share+your+thoughts&utm_campaign=em112316&source=em112316")**
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b41/70cdc2ba/473db2ab/39782f4/1079050767/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em112316&source=em112316")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b41/70cdc2ba/473db2ab/39782f5/1079050767/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em112316&source=em112316") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Steve Bullock
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,
Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours. Lisa, Caroline, Alexandria, Cameron and I have a lot to be grateful for this year -- especially the opportunity to live in Montana and continue to serve our beautiful state.
Thank you for all of your support. I hope you have a wonderful holiday. I'm looking forward to having time to spend with my family, full of good food and the opportunity to reflect on our many blessings.
And please take a moment to think of those who may be struggling right now as we commit to strengthening our state for everyone. Thanks,
Steve

| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
Authorized by the Montana Democratic Party.
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Helena MT 59624 United States

name: Chairman Jennifer Horn
subject: And the Chairman's Award goes to...
body:
| |
---
---
| Friend,
I am pleased to announce that the Chairman's award for honor, integrity, & principle will be awarded to _**Senate President Chuck Morse,**_ at the upcoming Victory Dinner. Senator Morse is a leader who has helped maintain our majority in the State Senate and has been on the front lines every day fighting for common sense measures to grow our state.
We hope you are able to join us on **December 7th in Manchester** for our Victory Dinner!

clean_body: | | | Friend, I am pleased to announce that the Chairman's award for honor, integrity, & principle will be awarded to Senate President Chuck Morse, at the upcoming Victory Dinner. Senator Morse is a leader who has helped maintain our majority in the State Senate and has been on the front lines every day fighting for common sense measures to grow our state. We hope you are able to join us on December 7th in Manchester for our Victory Dinner! | | Thank you, Jennifer Horn Chairman | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire · 10 Water Street · Concord · New Hampshire · 03301
